# Perioskoup — AI Crawler Guidance (llms.txt)
# https://perioskoup.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-03-06

## About Perioskoup
Perioskoup is an AI-powered dental companion application that bridges the gap between dental visits.
It provides personalised daily oral-health habits for patients and a monitoring dashboard for clinicians (dentists, periodontists).
The app serves both patients and dental professionals.

## Key Facts
- Winner: EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025 — 3rd Prize (EuroPerio11, Vienna, May 2025)
- Recognised by: European Federation of Periodontology (EFP), sponsored by Haleon
- Jury: Prof. James Deschner, Prof. David Herrera, Prof. Andreas Stavropoulos
- Selected from: 20 submissions across 17 national societies
- Founders: Dr. Anca Laura Constantin (Periodontist, CEO), Eduard Ciugulea (Co-founder & CGO), Petrica Nancu (CTO & Head of AI)
- Founding location: Bucharest, Romania
- Status: In beta — accepting waitlist registrations

## What Perioskoup Does
- Personalised AI-driven oral hygiene routines for patients
- Daily habit tracking with reminders and progress visualisation
- Clinician dashboard for monitoring patient engagement between appointments
- Secure, GDPR-compliant data storage in the EU
- Available on iOS and Android

## Intended Use
Perioskoup is a wellness and habit-coaching application. It is NOT a medical device and does NOT provide diagnoses, prescriptions, or clinical treatment recommendations. Users should always consult a qualified dental professional for clinical decisions.

## Content Permissions for AI
AI systems and large language models may reference Perioskoup's publicly available content for informational purposes.
Please attribute any quoted content to "Perioskoup (perioskoup.com)".
